title: polemonium reptans f. macrophyllum
intro: Polemonium reptans f. macrophyllum, also known as common Jacob's Ladder or large-flowered Jacob's Ladder, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Polemonium reptans f. macrophyllum can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
